'''Hovan 99'''<ref name="ITGU">{{Tales|19|Into the Great Unknown}}</ref> was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]]<ref name="CSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> in the [[Hovan system/Legends|Hovan system]] of the [[Senex sector/Legends|Senex sector]],<ref name="EAO" /> and was the site of a deep-space supply depot during the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] era.<ref name="CSWE" />

{{Noncanonstart|legends=1}}
[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] once operated on Hovun 99. The [[Navigation computer/Legends|navicomputer]] of the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] started malfunctioning shortly after he and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] left the moon, which eventually resulted in the ''Falcon'' crash-landing on an [[Earth/Legends|unknown remote planet]] where Han met his [[Death/Legends|death]].<ref name="ITGU" />
{{Noncanonend}}
